title: PJM-NYIS congestion/bottleneck candidate

notes: Uses NYISO hourly settlement congestion component, not only annual hub price level. Congestion component is 75.8% of mean absolute LBMP spread; NYCA LBMP above PJM proxy 94.3% of hours.
